programme.title: Stuff the British Stole

programme.title: Hope for Wildlife

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: An infection threatens to sweep through the chimpanzees, prompting the keepers to begin urgent action to save their lives. Meanwhile, the overweight orangutans continue with their diet and the lemurs are introduced to the stump-tailed macaques before they move in together.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Young chimp Ben's mysterious bacterial infection causes him to lose a toe, while another primate in Hananya's house is struck down by the same illness. Capuchin TJ settles in well with the ladies and his South American housemates learn how to forage for food. Members of staff hide hard-boiled eggs for the capuchins to find and animal director Jeremy has a run-in with female orangutan Lingga.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Six-month-old Alejandra falls from a tree and badly damages one of her eyes. Clara and her one-year-old daughter Clarita are chosen for release back into the wild, but a flash flood threatens the mission. Meanwhile, the vets provide around-the-clock care for Erik, who has a dangerous infection, and attempt to reintroduce Dilla to her daughter Delilah.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A couple finds a fixer-upper in Wisconsin that overlooks Lake Michigan, and they're doing all the renovation work themselves; he's a contractor with experience renovating properties, and she's ready to join him and get her hands dirty.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: Wanting to be closer to the family, first-time homebuyers look for a place that won't break their budget and that's close to their favorite lakes; with houses selling for over a million dollars, they need a diamond in the rough to fix.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The guys salvage five tobacco barns on one farm in Alton, Virginia, while Mark hunts for even more barns in Pennsylvania; Mark also visits an incredible finished home made of two cabins combined with a salt box addition.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders travel to Eagle Rock, Va., to build a dogtrot cabin in the Blue Ridge Mountains; Tim Rose travels to Halifax, Va., to see the finished log cabin they built five years earlier at the Springfield Distillery.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: Brett restores a classic Spanish Colonial Revival that hasn't been touched in years; his challenge is to make the kitchen and bath more functional while staying true to the home's 1920s character.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: A woman and her mother call on Brett to restore a 1927 Arts and Crafts house that's lost some character over the years; while restoring the exterior, kitchen and living room, Brett discovers a masterpiece hidden under all the added layers.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1913 Craftsman bungalow for a young couple with a baby on the way; he must find a way to bring back the natural wood in the house while making it bright and welcoming.

programme.title: Restored
programme.desc: Brett convinces a son and his mother to restore their beautiful 1901 shingle-style Victorian instead of selling it; the house suffers from a 1970s wood panel renovation, but Brett is determined to restore it back to its original glory.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A Texas couple teams up with two South African canvas tent experts to create their dream glamping experience. But they soon find the build is anything but luxurious. With rain, heat, and critters, they have to work together to reach the finish line.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A family builds thousands of earth blocks while withstanding winter monsoons, freezing temperatures and more to finish their forever home in San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Alaskan adventure guide Don Lee builds a remote survival cabin on top of a glacier, a site plagued with avalanches and unpredictable weather.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Michael surprises Ashley with an 1893 raised cottage he purchased before seeing the interior; they find themselves in over their heads after realizing it's not quite the hidden gem Michael thought it was.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Michael finds a 1931 craftsman bungalow that's near the beach, and after seeing it, they know they have to buy it.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a house in the historic district; it's their first renovation since Ashley became pregnant, and they hope to complete the massive project before the baby arrives.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley save a family's two-story 1800s home from a flip that would have been a flop; they restore the original features while working to preserve the property's historical integrity.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Thirty years after purchasing their lakeside home, grandparents need more space than their 100-year-old camp can provide for their growing family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Eldridge family owns a dilapidated camp on Lake Cobbosseeconntee, and the Cabin Masters have agreed to rescue the family camp and restore their good name, but as the team begins, they realize this little job has some big problems.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: After purchasing land in 2006, a man set out to construct a cabin within 72 hours, the resulting camp is lacking bedrooms, so the Cabin Masters create a main bedroom, sleeping areas and separate bathrooms.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A couple buys a dilapidated cabin in Phillips, Maine, in hopes of keeping the area's fly-fishing traditions alive; Chase Morrill and his team pull out all the stops to fix a myriad of issues in just 11 weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A family with a legacy of enjoying the lakes of Maine buys a 30-year-old gambrel garage with an efficiency apartment on the second floor.

programme.desc: After buying her parents' old summer camp, a mother calls on the Cabin Masters to help her renovate the home for her parents to retire in full-time; with a $40,000 budget and open timeline, Chase and his crew come in to transform this camp.
